name: How do these Perplexity copyright cases start? Do I need a lawyer?
description: File federal complaint with proof; yes, get a specialized lawyer immediately.[1][4]

mainEntity.name: How do these Perplexity copyright cases start? Do I need a lawyer?

acceptedAnswer.text: File federal complaint with proof; yes, get a specialized lawyer immediately.[1][4]
acceptedAnswer.description: Cases begin with filing a complaint in federal court alleging infringement, as NYT and Tribune did against Perplexity in New York.[1][3] Plaintiffs detail scraping, copying, and competitive outputs harming their business.[2][6] Key factors: Copyright registration, evidence of access/use, no fair use. Process involves discovery, motions (Perplexity's dismissal bid denied).[4] Yes, hire a copyright lawyer experienced in AI cases; self-representing risks missing deadlines. Start by sending cease-and-desist. These claims apply nationwide.
